title: Getting Started with Kestra
content: Kestra is an event-driven orchestration platform. Define flows in YAML, trigger them via schedules, webhooks, or file events, and monitor every execution in the UI.
author: platform-team

title: Blue/Green Data Promotion
content: Blue green deployment for data means staging a new dataset version in an isolated collection and atomically switching an alias when quality gates pass. Rollback is instant.
author: platform-team

title: Quality Gates Explained
content: Quality gates check completeness, uniqueness, schema drift and embedding coverage before any dataset version reaches production traffic.
author: data-eng

title: Why Event-Driven Ingestion
content: Event driven ingestion decouples producers from pipelines. Events queue in Redis Streams with idempotency keys and dead letter queues for poison messages.
author: data-eng

title: Vector Search Basics
content: Semantic search embeds documents and queries into the same vector space. Cosine similarity in Qdrant retrieves the nearest neighbors through a stable production alias.
author: search-team
